ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resource_instances" (
  "resource_instance_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each resource instance */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., equipment, personnel, facility) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource instance */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the resource */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was acquired */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was decommissioned */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the resource */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each relationship type */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship (e.g., ownership, utilization) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the relationship type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the relationship type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the relationship type */,
  "resource_instance_id_from" TEXT /* Source resource instance identifier */,
  "resource_instance_id_to" TEXT /* Target resource instance identifier */,
  "date_started" TEXT /* Date the relationship started */,
  "date_ended" TEXT /* Date the relationship ended */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the relationship */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the relationship */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Additional tags or labels for the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id", "resource_instance_id_from", "resource_instance_id_to"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_relationships_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_relationships_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "resource_instance_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource instance associated with the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., info, warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "resource_instance_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource instance if the action is related to a specific resource instance */,
  "relationship_id" TEXT /* ID of the relationship if the action is related to a specific relationship */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_resource_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_instance_id") REFERENCES resource_instances ("resource_instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id")
)
